name: Pop the Bugs

notes.en: Tap/click a bug the instant it pops up. Avoid the red trap bug. No keyboard.
notes.ru: Тапай/кликай жука сразу как он появился. Избегай красного жука-ловушки. Клавиатура не нужна.

notes: 60-second timed reaction round on a 4x4 grid of holes. Good bugs score points, the red trap bug costs points, a rare golden bug is worth a bonus. Difficulty (spawn interval + visible duration) ramps over the round down to a humanly-reactable floor. No bundled assets — bugs are inline SVG shapes with a neon glow filter.
